name: Dodge Brothers Model 30
description: The first car produced by Dodge Brothers Company in 1914.

name: Dodge Power Wagon
description: A military truck introduced in 1946, known for its off-road capabilities.

name: Dodge Coronet
description: A full-size car produced from 1950 to 2007 in various iterations.

name: Dodge Charger
description: A pony car first introduced in 1966 and reintroduced as a four-door sedan in 2005.

name: Dodge Challenger
description: A pony car introduced in 1970 and reintroduced in 2005.

name: Dodge Durango
description: A midsize SUV first introduced in 1998.
